title: TimeOffBalance

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

employee.description: The employee the balance belongs to.

balance.description: The current remaining PTO balance, measured in hours. For integrations that return this value in days, Merge multiplies by 8 to calculate hours.

used.description: The amount of PTO used in terms of hours. For integrations that return this value in days, Merge multiplies by 8 to calculate hours.

policy_type.description: The policy type of this time off balance.

remote_was_deleted.description: Indicates whether or not this object has been deleted in the third party platform. Full coverage deletion detection is a premium add-on. Native deletion detection is offered for free with limited coverage. [Learn more](https://docs.merge.dev/integrations/hris/supported-features/).

description:
# The TimeOffBalance Object
### Description
The `TimeOffBalance` object is used to represent current balances for an employee's Time Off plan.

### Usage Example
Fetch from the `LIST TimeOffBalances` endpoint and filter by `ID` to show all time off balances.
